summary: Added slugToBranch, createWorktreeIfNeeded, and removeWorktree helpers to run.mjs. Modified _runSingleFeature() to create a git worktree at .team/worktrees/{slug} on branch feature/{slug} before dispatching tasks, pass the worktree cwd to runGateInline, and remove the worktree after finalization. Added test/worktree.test.mjs with 11 unit tests; all 637 tests pass.
